user.title: Connect to INIM Cloud
user.description: Enter your INIM Cloud credentials and user code.

data_description.user_code: Alarm user code (e.g., 01234). Required for arm/disarm and bypass.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to INIM Cloud

error.mapping_required: Select at least one scenario or enable Remove mapping.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Configure polling, SIA-IP, scenario mapping and area arming modes.

data.excluded_alarm_memory_zones: Exclude zones from alarm memory exposure

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (10-300 seconds)
data_description.enable_sia: Enable local SIA-IP TCP listener for real-time updates from the panel
data_description.sia_port: TCP port for the SIA-IP listener (default: 6001)
data_description.sia_account: Filter messages by SIA account ID. Leave empty to accept all.
data_description.arm_away_scenario: Panel scenario to activate for Armed Away (e.g. Total). Leave empty to arm all areas.
data_description.arm_home_scenario: Panel scenario to activate for Armed Home (e.g. Night/partial). Leave empty to arm all areas.
data_description.disarm_scenario: Panel scenario to activate for Disarm. Leave empty to disarm all areas.
data_description.away_only_areas: Areas that should offer Armed Away but not Armed Home.
data_description.zone_alarm_memory_exposure: Choose how per-zone AlarmMemory flags are exposed. Alarm panels are useful for HomeKit important security notifications.
data_description.excluded_alarm_memory_zones: Zones selected here will not create alarm-memory binary sensors or read-only alarm panels.

area_scenarios.title: Per-area scenario mappings
area_scenarios.description: Choose an area to map. You can reopen this screen to configure another area.

area_scenario.title: Scenarios for {area_name}
area_scenario.description: Map each action to an explicit panel scenario. Leave actions blank to keep the InsertAreas fallback.

data_description.arm_away_scenario: Scenario to activate when this area is armed Away.
data_description.arm_home_scenario: Scenario to activate when this area is armed Home. Leave blank for Away-only areas.
data_description.disarm_scenario: Scenario to activate when this area is disarmed.
data_description.remove_area_scenario_mapping: Delete all explicit scenario mappings for this area.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The ID of the INIM device

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: The ID of the zone to bypass

bypass.name: Bypass
bypass.description: True to bypass, False to reinstate

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The ID of the INIM device

scenario_id.name: Scenario ID
scenario_id.description: The ID of the scenario to activate
